offersPage.combo1Desc: Includes 2 nights in a premium Suite, a complimentary 60-minute Spa treatment, and breakfast buffet for two.
offersPage.combo2Desc: Complimentary rose room decoration, a bottle of fine wine, and a candlelit dinner at our beachfront restaurant.
offersPage.combo3Desc: Stay at our Family Villa. Includes kids' play area tickets and a complimentary extra bed for children under 12.

offersPage.voucher3Desc: VIP Suite guests receive a complimentary premium dinner for two.
offersPage.voucher4Desc: Applicable to all room types for stays of 4 nights or more.

offersPage.pkg1Desc: 2 nights in a Deluxe room + 90-minute Spa for two + daily breakfast buffet.

offersPage.pkg3Desc: Ocean-view Suite + rose decoration + beachside candlelit dinner + welcome champagne.
offersPage.pkg4Desc: 3 nights in a beachfront Villa + airport transfer + snorkeling tour + private seafood BBQ.

attractionsPage.title: Explore & Local Guide
attractionsPage.subtitle: Unmissable destinations around The Royal Citadel
attractionsPage.noMapData: No map data available for this location.
attractionsPage.hoian_desc: Explore the UNESCO-listed ancient town with hundreds of heritage houses, the iconic Japanese Bridge, and enchanting lanterns glowing at night.
attractionsPage.hoian_full:
Hoi An Ancient Town – A UNESCO World Heritage Site.

🏛️ TOP HIGHLIGHTS:
• Japanese Covered Bridge – A historic icon over 400 years old
• Fujian Assembly Hall – Magnificent Chinese architecture
• Lantern Streets – Dazzling colors every full-moon night

🍜 SIGNATURE CUISINE:
• Cao Lau – Unique noodle dish exclusive to Hoi An
• Mi Quang – Rich Central Vietnamese flavors
• Banh Mi Phuong – World-famous

💡 TIPS: Visit in the late afternoon to enjoy the magical lantern atmosphere.
attractionsPage.bana_desc: A mountaintop resort featuring the world-famous Golden Bridge, a classic French village, Fantasy Park amusement center, and record-breaking cable cars.
attractionsPage.bana_full:
Ba Na Hills – A premier mountaintop resort, home to the iconic Golden Bridge.

🌉 HIGHLIGHTS:
• Golden Bridge – Top 100 most beautiful landmarks worldwide
• French Village – Classic European architecture
• Fantasy Park – Vietnam's largest indoor amusement park

🚡 CABLE CAR: 2 Guinness World Records
⏰ OPENING HOURS: 07:00 – 22:00
💰 TICKETS: From 900,000₫/adult
attractionsPage.mykhe_desc: Named by Forbes as one of the 6 most luxurious beaches on the planet. Pristine white sand, crystal-clear waters, ideal for surfing and sunbathing.
attractionsPage.mykhe_full:
My Khe Beach – Voted by Forbes as one of the 6 most luxurious beaches on the planet.

🏖️ FEATURES:
• Over 900m of pristine white sand
• Just 5 minutes' walk from The Royal Citadel

🏄 ACTIVITIES: Surfing, SUP, Parasailing
🌅 BEST TIMES: Sunrise (05:30) and sunset (17:00–18:00)
attractionsPage.marble_desc: Five sacred limestone peaks featuring a network of caves, ancient pagodas, and breathtaking panoramic views.
attractionsPage.marble_full:
Marble Mountains – Five limestone peaks representing the five elements.

⛰️ ATTRACTIONS:
• Huyen Khong Cave – The largest cave with stunning natural light
• Non Nuoc Pagoda – A centuries-old temple
• Xa Loi Tower – 360° panoramic views

⏰ OPENING HOURS: 07:00 – 17:30
💰 TICKETS: 40,000₫/person
attractionsPage.sontra_desc: A nature reserve home to Linh Ung Pagoda, Vietnam's tallest Guanyin Buddha statue, primeval forests, and unspoiled beaches.
attractionsPage.sontra_full:
Son Tra Peninsula – The "green lung" of Da Nang.

🌿 HIGHLIGHTS:
• Linh Ung Pagoda – Vietnam's tallest Lady Buddha at 67m
• Red-shanked Douc Langur – A rare primate species
• Bai But – A pristine beach

⏰ BEST TIMES: Early morning (5:00–7:00) or late afternoon
attractionsPage.hanmarket_desc: A bustling traditional market offering fresh seafood, Central Vietnamese specialties, souvenirs, and an authentic street food experience.
attractionsPage.hanmarket_full:
Han Market – Da Nang's oldest and most vibrant market.

🍜 MUST-TRY DISHES:
• Bun Cha Ca Da Nang – Signature fish cake noodle soup
• Banh Trang Cuon Thit Heo – Central Vietnam's #1 specialty
• Fresh Seafood – Grilled on the spot

⏰ OPENING HOURS: 06:00 – 19:00
💡 TIPS: Bargain for souvenirs (~70% of listed price)

servicesPage.title: Services & Amenities
servicesPage.subtitle: Experience 5-star premium services at The Royal Citadel
servicesPage.ctaDesc: Our Concierge team is ready to assist you 24/7
servicesPage.svc1Desc: An upscale restaurant serving premium Asian–European cuisine, fresh seafood, and a wine list curated by our Sommelier.
servicesPage.svc1Full:
The Jade Garden Restaurant is The Royal Citadel's culinary pride.

🍽️ SIGNATURE MENU:
• Lobster Thermidor
• Wagyu A5 Steak
• Phở Royal – 48-hour broth
• Seafood Tower – 3 tiers

⏰ SERVING HOURS: Breakfast 06:00–10:00 | Dinner 18:00–23:00
servicesPage.svc2Desc: A 2,000m² spa center with over 20 wellness and beauty treatments using organic natural ingredients.
servicesPage.svc2Full:
Royal Wellness Spa delivers the ultimate relaxation.

💆 SIGNATURE TREATMENTS:
• Royal Gold Facial – 24K gold mask (90 min)
• Herbal Body Wrap (120 min)
• Hot Stone Therapy (60 min)

⏰ HOURS: 08:00 – 22:00
servicesPage.svc3Desc: Modern gym with Technogym equipment, an infinity pool overlooking the sea, and daily morning yoga.
servicesPage.svc3Full:
Fitness & Aqua Center is the sports paradise.

🏋️ GYM: Full Technogym equipment
🏊 POOL: 50m Infinity Pool overlooking My Khe Beach
⏰ HOURS: 05:30 – 21:00
servicesPage.svc4Desc: A beauty salon with international experts, premium hair styling, skincare, and nail art services.
servicesPage.svc4Full:
Citadel Beauty Lounge – Beauty elevated to international standards.

💇 HAIR: Styling by international stylists
💅 NAIL ART: Gel, dipping powder
⏰ HOURS: 09:00 – 20:00
servicesPage.svc5Desc: Luxury airport transfers by limousine, private yacht tours, and sports car rentals.
servicesPage.svc5Full:
Limousine & Transfers – Travel in style.

🚗 AIRPORT TRANSFERS: Mercedes S-Class / Rolls-Royce Ghost
🚢 YACHT: Private Son Tra Peninsula tour
📞 BOOKING: 24/7 at Concierge
servicesPage.svc6Desc: A conference center with 5 meeting rooms for 10-500 guests, advanced AV technology, and luxury wedding services.
servicesPage.svc6Full:
Business & Events Center – The perfect space for every occasion.

🏢 MEETING ROOMS: Grand Ballroom (500 guests) | Boardroom VIP (20 guests)
🎊 EVENTS: Luxury weddings, Team Building
📞 CONTACT: events@royalcitadel.vn
